name: California Molded Fruitcake
recipeIngredient: 1 teaspoon Brandy extract OR (3/4 cup milk, 1/4 cup brandy)
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat butter until light and creamy.
2. Gradually add sugar, beating until smooth.
3. Beat egg yolks together lightly and add to the mixture.
4. Combine milk, brandy, and vanilla.
5. Mix flour and salt together.
6. Alternately add milk mix and flour mix to the butter mix.
7. Fold in fruits and nuts.
8. Beat egg whites with cream of tartar until stiff but not dry.
9. Gently fold the whites into the batter thoroughly.
10. Pour mixture into 2 buttered and floured 6-cup molds.
11. Bake at 275°F for 2 1/2 hours or until tested done.
12. Cool.
13. Unmold.
